message:
chore: remove unused imports across wizard and flywheel components

Clean up unused imports identified during code review to reduce
bundle size and improve code clarity.

apps/web/app/flywheel/page.tsx:
- Remove flywheelDescription from @/lib/flywheel imports
- The description is no longer used after recent page restructuring

apps/web/app/wizard/generate-ssh-key/page.tsx:
- Remove Sparkles and AlertCircle from lucide-react imports
- Remove Card from @/components/ui/card imports
- These were replaced by the AlertCard component in earlier commits
- Page now uses AlertCard for all callout boxes consistently

apps/web/components/flywheel-visualization.tsx:
- Remove useRef from React imports (not used in current implementation)
- Remove Link from next/link imports (navigation handled differently)

These are non-functional changes that improve code hygiene without
affecting runtime behavior. Smaller import footprints help with
tree-shaking and make dependencies more explicit.
